svg.text: Vibe coding is not a ServiceNow conversation — yet
% of LinkedIn posts mentioning "vibe coding" by platform · Jan 2024–Mar 2026
ServiceNow owns 0% of the vibe coding conversation its competitors dominate
Build Agent barely registers in the public conversation
% of ServiceNow LinkedIn posts mentioning each topic
Build Agent at 2% vs. Low-Code at 21% — the flagship AI feature is invisible externally
Organic posts get 8× more views than branded ones
Average views per post — branded vs. organic practitioner content
When real practitioners speak, people listen — the flywheel just isn't spinning yet
ServiceNow leads on enterprise — but owns none of the vibe coding narrative
% of LinkedIn posts mentioning "enterprise" vs. "vibe coding" per platform
ServiceNow's positioning gap: strong enterprise credibility, zero vibe coding mindshare
Source: LinkedIn scrape Jan 2024–Mar 2026 · 746 ServiceNow + 1,381 Lovable + 1,428 Replit + 1,426 Bolt posts analyzed · Reddit excluded (collection ongoing)
